textByHash.063ea0e21d8778c5cc98b0506a26b84ab923331f: Anyway, retiring isn't too bad. There's plenty of warmth from the lava pits, and my boy helps me carry my shopping from Munty's shop. I'll be alright.
textByHash.06888e12861ef9a90752231222de408026bf3d36: Me? Well, let's see... I live here. So I suppose I'm your host, as long as you're in my house.
textByHash.1b021a50c0ddacc83c168e3e3588a577a3a7f382: But you've never told me what you're doing in my house, young lady. Don't think I've forgotten!
textByHash.429950c2c9bd365431ffdda2c746980a5f09e76d: Oh, are you a door-to-door saleswoman? My boy said I shouldn't let people like you into the house, and to call the guards if you bothered me.
textByHash.514ef60a52ca4f559d02bcb6f6c706adf7b71489: But you've never told me what you're doing in my house, young man. Don't think I've forgotten!
textByHash.9d88d6790b7e6a0d073273b5f71523f0879a493b: Oh, are you a door-to-door salesman? My boy said I shouldn't let people like you into the house, and to call the guards if you bothered me.
textByHash.b45681c45ece29b140bde77b740c75dd71845ef2: Be a dear and just wander off now.
textByHash.b5344394bc0044a43978aabe3eca583ea4924e1b: Why, what brings you to my house, young man?
textByHash.b5f3dbbfcbd34565d384bd7159a3a1e86b622d26: So why are you in my house anyway?
textByHash.c7af78bdbbb3e3408d34d42074ce493284001c7a: I used to work down at the beach, running the charcoal furnaces, but I've handed all that business to my son now. He's a good boy.
textByHash.fa75d7b72167fb1c802896600637081d028baec3: Why, what brings you to my house, young lady?
